hc_add_series for forecast objects

Source: R/highcharts-api-add.R
hc_add_series.forecast.Rd

hc_add_series for forecast objects

Usage

# S3 method for class 'forecast'
hc_add_series(
  hc,
  data,
  addOriginal = FALSE,
  addLevels = TRUE,
  fillOpacity = 0.1,
  name = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

hc

A highchart htmlwidget object.

data

A forecast object.

addOriginal

Logical value to add the original series or not.

addLevels

Logical value to show predictions bands.

fillOpacity

The opacity of bands.

name

The name of the series.

...

Arguments defined in https://api.highcharts.com/highcharts/chart.

On this page
